name: container-nginx-vuln
description: Known-vulnerable nginx 1.14 (debian 9.8) base image. trivy must surface its well-known CVEs.

competitors.leaderboard: Trivy / Snyk Container / Anchore — self-published only (no neutral leaderboard for container CVE scanning)
competitors.note: Container CVE detection has no neutral competitor scorecard; recall is measured against a curated must-find CVE set from this image's known advisories.
